VAL-ABS-002.title: CodexProvider wraps AppServerClient without behavior change
VAL-ABS-002.evidence: All 4 tests passed. codex_provider_implements_trait confirmed trait implementation. AppServerEvent envelope mapping tests (notification, lagged, disconnected) passed.

VAL-ABS-003.title: CodexProvider reports connected state accurately
VAL-ABS-003.evidence: Both tests passed. mock_provider_connect_disconnect verified is_connected() state transitions. boxed_mock_provider_through_trait confirmed trait object dispatch.

VAL-ABS-004.title: CodexProvider disconnect is idempotent and safe
VAL-ABS-004.evidence: Both tests passed. Double-disconnect did not panic or produce errors.

VAL-ABS-005.title: Post-disconnect requests return TransportError::Disconnected
VAL-ABS-005.evidence: All 3 tests passed. send_request, send_notification, and list_sessions all return Disconnected error after disconnect.

VAL-ABS-006.title: ServerSession::from_provider creates connected session
VAL-ABS-006.evidence: Test passed. Session created with Connected health state.

VAL-ABS-007.title: from_provider routes requests through provider trait
VAL-ABS-007.evidence: Both tests passed. Requests route through ProviderTransport::send_request with method and params preserved.

VAL-ABS-008.title: from_provider routes notifications through provider trait
VAL-ABS-008.evidence: Both tests passed. Notifications route through ProviderTransport::send_notification with method and params preserved.

VAL-ABS-009.title: Provider events bridged to ServerEvent correctly
VAL-ABS-009.evidence: Both tests passed. ProviderEvents are converted to ServerEvents and broadcast in correct order.

VAL-ABS-010.title: from_provider disconnect transitions health
VAL-ABS-010.evidence: Both tests passed. Disconnect transitions health to Disconnected and disconnected event updates health.

VAL-ABS-011.title: Exhaustive ServerNotification → ProviderEvent mapping
VAL-ABS-011.evidence: Both tests passed. All notification variants mapped; unknown variants fall through to Unknown.

VAL-ABS-012.title: Exhaustive ServerRequest → ProviderEvent mapping
VAL-ABS-012.evidence: All 5 tests passed. All ServerRequest variants mapped to ProviderEvent with correct kinds.

VAL-ABS-013.title: ProviderEvent → UiEvent pipeline completeness
VAL-ABS-013.evidence: Test passed. Every ProviderEvent variant either maps to a UiEvent or explicitly returns None (internal).

VAL-ABS-014.title: Round-trip ServerNotification → ProviderEvent → UiEvent preserves data
VAL-ABS-014.evidence: All 3 tests passed. Critical fields (thread_id, turn_id, item_id, delta, token counts) preserved through full pipeline.

VAL-ABS-015.title: AppServerEvent envelope mapping
VAL-ABS-015.evidence: All 3 tests passed. All four AppServerEvent variants (Notification, Request, Lagged, Disconnected) map correctly.

VAL-ABS-044.title: Thread operations through provider path
VAL-ABS-044.evidence: Test passed. Thread lifecycle (create, archive, rename, list) works through provider-backed session.

VAL-ABS-045.title: Turn operations through provider path
VAL-ABS-045.evidence: Test passed. Turn lifecycle (start, stream deltas, complete) works through provider-backed session.

VAL-ABS-047.title: No provider-specific logic leaks into ServerSession
VAL-ABS-047.evidence: Code inspection via rg confirmed no Any::downcast, downcast_ref, or as_ref::<CodexProvider> usage in session/connection.rs. from_provider uses only ProviderTransport trait methods.

VAL-ABS-049.title: Streaming event ordering preserved
VAL-ABS-049.evidence: Both tests passed. Events arrive in FIFO order through the provider pipeline.

VAL-ABS-050.title: Context token accounting through provider path
VAL-ABS-050.evidence: All 5 tests passed. used = input + output, limit = model_context_window, edge cases handled.

VAL-ABS-051.title: Error event from provider reaches UI layer
VAL-ABS-051.evidence: Test passed. ProviderEvent::Error produces UiEvent::Error with message and code preserved.

VAL-ABS-052.title: Realtime voice events through provider path
VAL-ABS-052.evidence: Both tests passed. RealtimeStarted and RealtimeClosed events bridge correctly through the pipeline.

VAL-ABS-053.title: IPC stream functional for provider-backed Codex sessions
VAL-ABS-053.evidence: Both tests passed. IPC API surface and config types are preserved through provider path.

VAL-ABS-056.title: No deadlock between provider command and event paths
VAL-ABS-056.evidence: Both tests passed. Concurrent commands and events complete without deadlock.

VAL-ABS-058.title: ProviderEvent Unknown preserves forward compatibility
VAL-ABS-058.evidence: Both tests passed. Unknown upstream events map to ProviderEvent::Unknown and forward as UiEvent::RawNotification.

VAL-ABS-059.title: Cancel during active streaming emits well-formed terminal event
VAL-ABS-059.evidence: Both tests passed. Cancel during streaming produces terminal TurnCompleted event with no orphaned state.

summary: Tested 25 assertions: all 25 passed. Total tests run: 47 cargo tests + 2 rg inspections, all green. No frictions or blockers encountered.
